title: swintonia sarawakana
intro: Swintonia sarawakana, also known as Borneo rosewood, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is native to the tropical rainforests of Borneo, where its wood is highly valued for its durability and beauty. The medicinal properties of Swintonia sarawakana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Swintonia sarawakana include infusions and decoctions that can be used to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system.
